title: The Leonardo Collection William Morris Pimpernel Floral Small Kitchen and Home Serving Tray Tea Bag Tidy
features: Small serving tray for use in the kitchen and home with Pimpernel design by William Morris.
Made from melamine, a hard wearing and extremely damage resistant alternative to porcelain.
Perfect for serving a cup of tea, biscuits or cakes and is easy to wipe clean.
Handles on either side for ease of carrying and raised edges prevents any overspill.
Measures approx 20cm x 14cm. Not suitable for dishwasher or microwave use.
